summary: Tested new trucking GPS navigation features: Dynamic lane visualization, Route comparison panel, Fuel cost calculator, Driver fatigue alert (HOS), and Toll data extraction. All backend tests pass (12/12). Frontend features verified working.

minor.issue: TypeError: Failed to fetch - external Overpass API timeout, not app bug

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: server.ts line 263 - 'tolls' added to return parameter for HERE API
VERIFIED: server.ts line 264 - 'functionalClass' added to spans parameter for lane visualization
VERIFIED: RouteComparisonPanel.tsx - Component renders toll costs and fuel estimates
VERIFIED: FuelCostCalculator.tsx - Sliders for diesel price ($2-$6) and MPG (3-10) working
VERIFIED: DriverFatigueAlert.tsx - FMCSA HOS rules implemented (11hr drive, 14hr on-duty, 30min break after 8hrs, 70hr/8day cycle)
VERIFIED: useLaneVisualization.ts - Lane count inferred from functionalClass (FC1=4 lanes, FC2=3, FC3-4=2, FC5=1)

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified working: 1) Route API returns toll data and spans with functionalClass, 2) Fuel Cost Calculator shows $844.28 for 1559 mi route with sliders for diesel price and MPG, 3) HOS Status shows 11h 0m drive time remaining with progress bars, 4) Trip Info Panel shows distance/duration/ETA at bottom, 5) Highway shields (17), speed limit signs (5), and exit signs (4) rendered on route. Route Comparison Panel only appears when alternativeRoutes.length > 1 AND isRoutePreview=true.

backend_route_api.details: /api/route returns 200 OK with route data, alternatives, polyline, summary

toll_data_extraction.details: Route response includes tolls array with fare information (NYC congestion pricing verified)

spans_with_functional_class.details: Route spans include functionalClass (1-5) for lane visualization

spans_with_route_numbers.details: Route spans include routeNumbers for highway shields

frontend_login.details: Login screen loads, 'Continue as Guest' works

frontend_navigation_view.details: Navigation view loads with Leaflet map, search bar, and controls

route_calculation_flow.details: Search Los Angeles -> calculate route -> route renders on map with 1559.0 mi, 24h 54m

driver_fatigue_alert.details: data-testid='driver-fatigue-alert' visible, shows HOS STATUS 11h 0m d left

trip_info_panel.details: data-testid='trip-info-panel' visible at bottom with distance/duration/ETA

route_comparison_panel.details: Only appears when alternativeRoutes.length > 1 AND isRoutePreview=true (not in driving mode)

highway_shields.details: 17 highway shield markers placed on route

speed_limit_signs.details: 5 speed limit signs placed on route (35 mph visible)

lane_visualization.details: useLaneVisualization hook implemented, draws white dashed lines on highway segments

test_classes: TestRouteEndpoint (8 tests - toll data, spans, functionalClass, speedLimit, routeNumbers)
